contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Fix three production bugs on perch.truesight.me (500 errors + missing chart data)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1097
  
  Details:
  ## What changed
  
  Diagnosed and fixed three production bugs on `perch.truesight.me` (sentiment_importer):
  
  ### 1. Landing page 500: Date.parse on Time object (sentiment_importer#1097)
  - `get_date_range_for_market` in `app/helpers/application_helper.rb` called `Date.parse()` on raw PostgreSQL results, but PG returns `date_published` as a `Time` object, not a `String`. This caused `TypeError: no implicit conversion of Time into String` on every request to `/`.
  - Fix: Changed `Date.parse(r['date_published'])` to `r['date_published'].to_date`.
  
  ### 2. /large_dips 500: broken route helper shadowing (sentiment_importer#1098)
  - Commit 08c42e24 introduced `helper_method :my_shopping_path` and `helper_method :large_dips_path` in `daily_trades_controller.rb` that called non-existent `my_shopping_daily_trades_path` and `large_dips_daily_trades_path` route helpers, shadowing the valid route-generated helper.
  - Fix: Removed both helper methods so the route helpers resolve correctly.
  
  ### 3. Charts missing data after June 11, 2026 (sentiment_importer#1099)
  - `LargeDipIndexRefresher` (app/workers/large_dip_index_refresher.rb) referenced `MINIMUM_TRADE_COUNT` without the `DailyTrade::` qualifier, causing `NameError` on every run since June 11. Raw price data imported fine, but sell-off index records (used by the charts) were never created.
  - Fix: Changed `MINIMUM_TRADE_COUNT` to `DailyTrade::MINIMUM_TRADE_COUNT`. Backfilled 13 missing June trading days.
  
  ### Infrastructure fixes during deployment
  - `seni_ror`: Killed stale `nohup` Rails process holding port 3002 with old code; cleared stale PID file blocking systemd restart.
  - `seni_sk_nelanco`: Cleared 1.8GB of old log files (disk was 100% full); restarted `systemd-resolved` (DNS was broken).
  
  ## Pull requests
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1097 — Fix: date nav pills crash when SQL returns Time objects
  - Commit 7e2cd2c6 — Fix: remove broken my_shopping_path/large_dips_path helper methods
  - Commit 02b2a0f5 — Fix: qualify MINIMUM_TRADE_COUNT in LargeDipIndexRefresher
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
